title: Psychotherapy Services
excerpt: Evidence-based psychotherapy for adults in Ontario.
body:
At **Voice Awareness Psychotherapy**, we offer psychotherapy and counseling services for adults navigating anxiety, trauma, emotional overwhelm, relationship challenges, and life transitions. Our work is grounded in evidence-based and trauma-informed care, with a strong emphasis on collaboration, consent, and emotional safety.

## Core services

### Stress management
Personalized psychotherapy sessions to manage and alleviate the pressures of stress, supporting a more joyful life with purpose.

### Relationship trauma
Relationship trauma can be multi-symptomatic and complex. Therapeutic techniques create space to process thoughts and feelings, identify common ground, and expand your support system — individually or as a couple.

### Emotional stability
When emotions feel intensely low or high — related to temperament, environment, or trauma — emotion regulation skills can restore balance.

### Personal growth
As your therapist, I help identify roadblocks, trigger self-awareness, and support personal evolution — including breaking through creative or emotional blocks.

## Therapeutic approaches

Our services may integrate:

- Cognitive Behavioural Therapy (CBT)
- Dialectical Behaviour Therapy (DBT)
- Internal Family Systems (IFS)
- Trauma-informed psychotherapy
- Brainspotting
- Mindfulness-based and nervous-system-focused interventions

Approaches are selected based on individual needs and adjusted over time. Therapy is not one-size-fits-all.

## Jurisdiction

Voice Awareness provides psychotherapy to clients in **Ontario**, and where permitted, to individuals in other jurisdictions through secure virtual therapy. Availability outside Ontario depends on regulatory requirements in the client's location.

[Book a free consultation](https://voiceawareness.janeapp.com/#staff_member/1) to explore fit and next steps.
